title: Implement CubicExt<F> with Toom-Cook multiplication
description: Core type: struct CubicExt<F> { c0: F, c1: F, c2: F }. Implement FiniteField trait. Toom-Cook multiplication: 5 base-field muls instead of 9. Chung-Hasan SQR variant for squaring. Location: crates/gf2-core/src/gfpn/tower.rs. Must pass axiom test harness.
